name: Aeva Technologies, Inc.
business: Aeva's mission is to bring the next wave of perception technology to broad applications from automated driving, manufacturing automation and smart infrastructure, robotics and consumer devices. We provide perception solutions that enable our customers to see the world around them more clearly and in new ways.

exposures.sentence: Aeva Atlas is a high-performance FMCW 4D LiDAR with simultaneous velocity and range detection up to 500 meters.
The Aeva Eve 1 line of high-precision laser displacement sensors, beginning with Eve 1D, is the first FMCW-based sensor for high-volume industrial automation.
Aeva’s mission is to bring the next wave of perception technology to broad applications from automated driving, manufacturing automation and smart infrastructure, robotics and consumer devices.

Within the automotive sector, we expect our 4D LiDAR solution to be integrated into the vehicle as part of the vehicle integration and production processes to provide perception sensing capability as part of the vehicle’s overall autonomous driving stack.

Aeva Atlas Orion is a high-performance 4D LiDAR sensor designed for smart infrastructure, intelligent transportation systems and security applications that meets NEMA-TS2 (National Electrical Manufacturers Association traffic standards) and offers durable, long-range perception for outdoor environments.

catalysts.event: Selected by top European passenger OEM as exclusive LiDAR supplier for global series-production vehicle platform for Level 3 automated driving
catalysts.sentence: In addition, in December 2025, we were selected by a top European passenger original equipment manufacturer as its exclusive LiDAR supplier for its global series-production vehicle platform to enable Level 3 automated driving.

catalysts.event: Entered into strategic collaboration with LG Innotek Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: For example, in May 2025, we entered into a strategic collaboration with LG Innotek Co., Ltd.
